fix: Add data-toggle="dropdown" to the <a> tag for 'Foods'

problem: Dropdown does not open on click
detail: After clicking toggle, menu remains hidden. Bootstrap JS is not handling the click event.
fix: 1. Add data-toggle='dropdown' (BS4) to toggle element. 2. Ensure bootstrap.bundle.min.js is loaded. 3. Check for JS errors in browser console.
